user_story: Como usuário, eu quero que a lista de check-ins seja paginada para que a tela não fique sobrecarregada com centenas de itens.
test_output_summary: No existing tests for CheckInsPager or totalCheckInPages. Component code inspection shows correct implementation.
failure_details: Unit tests missing for CheckInsPager component and totalCheckInPages utility function.
notes: ✓ Component correctly returns null when pages <= 1 (line 25) — meets RF-009
✓ totalCheckInPages correctly calculates pages with Math.ceil(total / pageSize) — meets RF-008 requirement
✓ Both components properly imported and used in apps/frontend/src/app/(authenticated)/check-ins/page.tsx
✗ No unit tests exist for CheckInsPager render logic
✗ No unit tests exist for totalCheckInPages utility
✗ Page-level tests (page.test.tsx) do not cover pagination behavior
NOTE: RF-008 page size is backend-controlled via CHECK_INS_DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE=20, not frontend-enforced in component

implementation_verified.component_integration: Properly wired in CheckInsPageContent() via useCheckInFilters hook
